creator: kentas@hush.com
text:
On 08/28/2013 at 10:58 AM, "Denis Generalov" <gd@powernet.ru> wrote:
>
>Could you try to remove "-Qunused-parameter -Qunused-arguments"
>from CFLAGS var in /etc/make.conf?
>

For some reason, poudriere does not want to unset that option. I removed it from /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf
but it persists in the compilation log. I thought that CFLAG just told clang to be less verbose, so I wonder if it's the cause
of the problem or not. Full log attached again.
